ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency (e.g. Ethereum) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g. ETH) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* The total number of coins in circulation */,
  "max_supply" TEXT /* The maximum number of coins that will ever be in circulation */,
  "total_supply" TEXT /* The total number of coins that have been mined or issued */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the cryptocurrency's data */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for the price entry */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* The total trading volume in the last 24 hours */,
  "high_24h" REAL /* The highest price in the last 24 hours */,
  "low_24h" REAL /* The lowest price in the last 24 hours */,
  "open_24h" REAL /* The opening price at the start of the 24-hour period */,
  "close_24h" REAL /* The closing price at the end of the 24-hour period */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trader, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number for additional contact information */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency for which the alert is set */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., login, logout, view price) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user at the time of interaction */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for the interaction */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction (e.g., specific action taken) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency related to the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend entry */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Calculated trend value (e.g., moving average) */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* The type of trend (e.g., moving average, exponential moving average) */,
  "period" INTEGER /* The period over which the trend is calculated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trend data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* The exact time the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who subscribed */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency for which the updates are subscribed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date when the subscription started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the subscription ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
